## Delivery Contract

- Design / contract:
- Delivery ledger:
- Total items:
- DONE:
- EXCEPTION:
- Incomplete:

## Validation

```bash
node mango-pmo/tools/delivery-contract-check.mjs \
  --design <design-or-contract-path> \
  --ledger <delivery-ledger-path> \
  --mode verify
```

## PMO Exceptions

- None
